paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Updated pretraining data mix, doubled context length to 4096 tokens, and introduced Grouped Query Attention (GQA) for improved scalability
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: New mix of publicly available online data (2 trillion tokens, 40% increase from Llama 1)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, chat applications, instruction-following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, safe, and effective large language models for open-source deployment
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: NVIDIA A100 GPUs (Research SuperCluster and internal production clusters)
raw_extraction.extension: Grouped Query Attention (GQA) improves inference scalability for larger models
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Optimized for dialogue use cases through supervised fine-tuning, RLHF, and Ghost Attention (GAtt) for maintaining multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: New mix of publicly available online data (2 trillion tokens, 40% increase from Llama 1)
raw_extraction.application: Dialogue systems, conversational agents, chat applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Safe, aligned, and effective chat models for real-world deployment
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) + Ghost Attention (GAtt) for multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.extension: Ghost Attention (GAtt) enables controlled dialogue flow over multiple turns
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Foundation model trained via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF) using Rejection Sampling and PPO
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose conversational agent, instruction-following, chat applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-quality dialogue systems with improved alignment and multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Ghost Attention (GAtt) for multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.extension: Ghost Attention (GAtt) enables long-term memory retention in multi-turn dialogues by injecting system messages into user prompts during fine-tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Foundation model trained via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF) using Rejection Sampling and PPO
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose conversational agent, instruction-following, chat applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-quality dialogue systems with improved alignment and multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Ghost Attention (GAtt) for multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.extension: Ghost Attention (GAtt) enables long-term memory retention in multi-turn dialogues by injecting system messages into user prompts during fine-tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Foundation model trained via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF) using Rejection Sampling and PPO, with iterative improvements across RLHF versions (V1–V5)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose conversational agent, instruction-following, chat applications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable, high-quality dialogue systems with improved alignment and multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Ghost Attention (GAtt) for multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.extension: Ghost Attention (GAtt) enables long-term memory retention in multi-turn dialogues by injecting system messages into user prompts during fine-tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuned version of Llama 2 Base 7B using Rejection Sampling and PPO-based RLHF, incorporating Ghost Attention (GAtt) for multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following chatbot, dialogue systems, general-purpose conversation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Alignment and safety refinement for conversational agents
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Ghost Attention (GAtt) for multi-turn consistency
raw_extraction.extension: Ghost Attention (GAtt) enables long-term memory retention in multi-turn dialogues by injecting system messages into user prompts during fine-tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tunes Llama 2 base models using RLHF and context distillation to improve safety, reduce toxic outputs, and align responses with user expectations while maintaining helpfulness
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, chatbot applications, instruction-following systems, and interactive Q&A platforms
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human preferences and safety constraints through iterative feedback and targeted fine-tuning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with safety-focused context distillation
raw_extraction.extension: Utilizes tailored answer templates and context distillation to mitigate false refusals and improve safety in adversarial scenarios
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuned variant of Llama 2 13B designed specifically for chat applications, incorporating advanced alignment techniques including RLHF to enhance helpfulness, harmlessness, and adherence to user instructions. Demonstrates emergent capabilities such as tool use and temporal reasoning without explicit training
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, chat interfaces, interactive Q&A, and user-facing applications requiring alignment with human preferences
raw_extraction.research_problem: Creating safe, aligned, and effective chat models capable of handling complex user interactions
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
raw_extraction.extension: Emergent tool use capability demonstrated through zero-shot generalization to external APIs and calculators
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a new large language model (Llama 2) with improved training techniques including curriculum-based RLHF and enhanced safety mechanisms. Uses a combination of supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning to optimize helpfulness and safety
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text corpus (including publicly available datasets)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, chat applications, instruction-following, and conversational agents
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing advanced large language models with improved performance, safety, and alignment with human preferences
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) for chat models
raw_extraction.extension: Curriculum-based RLHF strategy improves preference data collection over batches, enhancing model alignment
raw_extraction.paper_title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
